name: Tasman Resources Ltd
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.0590. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.0592 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.0590, stop A$0.0505, target A$0.0600. Risk/reward is 0.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
